name: 16_Credit_Scoring_DecisionTree_GermanCredit_ML
query: Nisaidie kuendeleza mfumo wa kutabiri alama za mkopo kwa kutumia seti ya data ya German Credit, ambayo inaweza kupakuliwa kutoka [kiungo hiki](https://archive.ics.uci.edu/dataset/144/statlog+german+credit+data). Pakia seti ya data na uifanyie usindikaji wa awali, ikiwa ni pamoja na kushughulikia thamani zinazokosekana na usimbaji wa vipengele, katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tumia classifier ya Decision Tree iliyotekelezwa katika `src/model.py` na utumie cross-validation kutathmini mfano katika `src/train.py`. Onyesha umuhimu wa vipengele katika `results/figures/feature_importances.png`. Tengeneza ripoti ya uainishaji, ikiwa ni pamoja na usahihi, urejeshaji, na F1-score, na uhifadhi katika `results/metrics/classification_report.txt`. Tengeneza ripoti ya Markdown yenye matokeo na vielelezo na uhifadhi katika `results/report.md`. Seti ya data inapaswa kupakiwa vizuri na kushughulikia makosa ipasavyo, na ripoti ya Markdown inapaswa kupangwa vizuri kwa urahisi wa mapitio.

requirements.criteria: Pakia seti ya data ya "German Credit", ikiwezekana kuipakua kutoka [kiungo hiki](https://archive.ics.uci.edu/dataset/144/statlog+german+credit+data) katika faili `src/data_loader.py`.
Usindikaji wa awali wa data unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`, ikiwa ni pamoja na kushughulikia thamani zinazokosekana na usimbaji wa vipengele.
Ripoti ya uainishaji, ikiwa ni pamoja na "usahihi," "urejeshaji," na "F1-score," inatengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/metrics/classification_report.txt`.
Faili ya Markdown yenye matokeo na vielelezo inatengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa katika `results/report.md`.

preferences.criteria: Seti ya data inapaswa kupakiwa vizuri, na kushughulikia makosa kwa uwazi ikiwa kuna matatizo yoyote yanayotokea wakati wa kupakua.
Ripoti ya Markdown inapaswa kupangwa vizuri, ikifanya iwe rahisi kupitia matokeo yote na vielelezo.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The `src/data_loader.py` file does not implement any actual data preprocessing. It is a minimal placeholder/stub that only contains:
- A list of requirement criteria strings (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`)
- A `load_dataset()` function that returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` with no real data loading
- A `build_transforms()` function returning a static list of strings

There is no actual implementation of:
- Loading the German Credit dataset
- Handling missing values
- Feature encoding (e.g., one-hot encoding, label encoding, ordinal encoding)

The file explicitly states it is a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" and a "placeholder," confirming that the preprocessing requirement has not been genuinely fulfilled.

<UNSATISFIED>: The `src/model.py` file does not implement an actual Decision Tree classifier. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub implementation with metadata strings (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`, `KEYWORDS`) and a `build_model()` function that returns a string placeholder (`"model placeholder"`). There is no import of `DecisionTreeClassifier` from scikit-learn or any other library, no actual model instantiation, training logic, or any functional Decision Tree implementation whatsoever.

<UNSATISFIED>: The `src/train.py` file does not implement any cross-validation. The code only contains a minimal "training loop" (`train()`) that simply sums numbers in a range, with no use of scikit-learn's `cross_val_score`, `KFold`, `StratifiedKFold`, or any other cross-validation mechanism. The `save_expected_artifacts()` function merely creates placeholder files with dummy text. There is no actual model training, no dataset loading, and no cross-validation evaluation whatsoever.

<UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/figures/feature_importances.png` exists in the workspace structure, but its content could not be read or verified due to an image format error (the system attempted to read it as JPEG but it is a PNG file, resulting in a `BadRequestError`). Therefore, it cannot be confirmed that the feature importances visualization is valid or correctly rendered. The trajectory evidence also confirms no steps related to the creation or saving of this file were found, making it impossible to verify the requirement is satisfied.
